_meta.description: Example entity fixtures derived from Session 1 play. Used by unit and integration tests that need realistic entity data without live Foundry.

data.name: Unknown Courier
data.goal: Deliver the iron navigational panel to an unknown recipient
data.notes: Female, adult. Radiation exposure consistent with Ascendancy vault contact. Has not released the iron panel even under sedation. Deliberate courier — Sable's assessment: she was not escaping, she was delivering. Name not yet established — formalize Connection when she regains consciousness.
history: Found alive in debris field during intercept — unusual; player noted this was a first.
Stabilized by autodoc under duress (Face Danger +Wits, Weak Hit). Three treatable conditions, two monitorable, one flagged with Ascendancy vault radiation signature.
Sable identified her as a courier, not a refugee.
data.artPrompt: weathered older woman, former military insignia scratched off armor, unconscious in medical bay, science fiction setting, gritty realistic
pendingActions: Name NPC when she regains consciousness to formalize Connection
Identify the script on the iron panel

data.name: Player Ship
data.notes: Sable is the ship AI — present via Weave dataweave, voice from doorways. Med bay described as 'maybe up to the task' — limited capability confirmed by autodoc weak hit result.
crew: Sable (AI — Adept-adjacent status unclear under Covenant law)
history: Successfully navigated dense debris field (Face Danger +Wits, Weak Hit — success with cost).
Med bay pushed to capacity stabilizing the courier.

data.name: Iron Navigational Panel
data.description: Salvaged iron — Exodus ship remnant repurposed as a navigational instrument. Ascendancy script beneath standard navigational markings, partially worn away. Radiation signature matches Ascendancy vault contact.
data.radiationSignature: Ascendancy vault — autodoc database identified with 'uncomfortable confidence'
data.script: Ascendancy script — unrecognized, finer than surface markings, partially worn
data.custody: Courier — not released even under sedation
openThreads: Determine the intended recipient of the delivery
Assess whether the panel is a navigational instrument, a key, or something else
data.notes: Two active threads: NPC condition and artifact identity (per module behind-the-scenes notes). Do not conflate — resolve NPC arc first.

data.name: Sable
data.notes: Speaks from doorways, half in the dataweave. Legal status under Covenant AI law unclear — functions as an Adept-equivalent but is not human. Key line delivered: 'She wasn't escaping from something. She was delivering it.' Treat as trusted crew member for now.
